name: capecho
description: Capecho monorepo root — shared dev tooling + workspace-wide typecheck/test gates.

scripts.format:dart: find shared clients -name '*.dart' -not -path '*/.dart_tool/*' -not -path '*/build/*' -not -path '*/generated/*' -print0 | xargs -0 dart format -l 100
scripts.format:dart:check: find shared clients -name '*.dart' -not -path '*/.dart_tool/*' -not -path '*/build/*' -not -path '*/generated/*' -print0 | xargs -0 dart format -l 100 --output=none --set-exit-if-changed
